name: Athena High School
description: Carabiners have been installed on the center net anchors to facilitate switching the net height between tennis and pickelball.  Rotating the carabiner 90 degrees pulls the center of the net down 3 inches, which sets the net to the proper height for pickelball.
open_play_schedule: Pickelball players from the NW YMCA play here when the weather is nice starting at 6:30 am weekdays.
